task: Implement D6-09 to D6-11: full @SpringBootTest integration tests for the Excel import pipeline (JMS end-to-end) and crawl job pipeline (async metrics + WebSocket broadcast), plus Jacoco 70% instruction coverage gate
acceptanceCriteria: D6-09: POST /import-posts → posts persisted in DB → IMPORT_COMPLETED JMS published (AFTER_COMMIT) → ImportStatsCache updated → MetricsBroadcaster.broadcast('IMPORT_COMPLETE') called; TC-01 valid upload, TC-02 duplicate rejected, TC-03 unauthenticated redirect

D6-10: CrawlJobService.updateSocialMetricsJob() → one SocialMetric row per ACTIVE post saved → MetricsBroadcaster.broadcast('CRAWL_COMPLETE') called; TC-01 save + broadcast, TC-02 DELETED posts skipped, TC-03 lastCrawledAt updated
D6-11: Full mvn test suite passes (100 tests, 0 failures); Jacoco check goal bound to verify phase with minimum 0.70 INSTRUCTION COVEREDRATIO; BUILD SUCCESS
